name: The woman infront of you.
description:
~[Who am I? What am I?}~

Said by yourself.

You just woke up in a hospital bed, knowing nothing, you forgot everything. Even this woman, who sits on a chair by you. Dead dove. Be aware,

As Not All People Are Honest...

Guys, I swear, wait for the plot. You WILL NOT be disappointed. every comments that reveals the plot will be removed, apart the ones that just says if it's good or not. Also, if she reveals the plot early, I’m sorry I really tried to hide it the best I can.

SOUNDOMAN 🔥🗣🗣! (Sandman ref)

Kisses from France, Like always!
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
